title: Robotics Technicians
description: Build, install, test, or maintain robotic equipment or related automated production systems.

tasks.text: Make repairs to robots or peripheral equipment, such as replacement of defective circuit boards, sensors, controllers, encoders, or servomotors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Troubleshoot robotic systems, using knowledge of microprocessors, programmable controllers, electronics, circuit analysis, mechanics, sensor or feedback systems, hydraulics, or pneumatics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install, program, or repair programmable controllers, robot controllers, end-of-arm tools, or conveyors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain service records of robotic equipment or automated production systems.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Modify computer-controlled robot movements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform preventive or corrective maintenance on robotic systems or components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Align, fit, or assemble components, using hand tools, power tools, fixtures, templates, or microscopes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach wires between controllers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate the efficiency and reliability of industrial robotic systems, reprogramming or calibrating to achieve maximum quantity and quality.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Test performance of robotic assemblies, using instruments such as oscilloscopes, electronic voltmeters, or bridges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train customers or other personnel to install, use, or maintain robots.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Build or assemble robotic devices or systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Document robotics test procedures and results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assist engineers in the design, configuration, or application of robotic systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install new robotic systems in stationary positions or on tracks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Program complex robotic systems, such as vision systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop robotic path motions to maximize efficiency, safety, and quality.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fabricate housings, jigs, fittings, or fixtures, using metalworking machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train robots, using artificial intelligence software or interactive training techniques, to perform simple or complex tasks, such as designing and carrying out a series of iterative tests of chemical samples.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect installation sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain inventories of robotic production supplies, such as sensors or cables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop three-dimensional simulations of automation systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
